title: MR Strategy — FCF Top-200, 10 Most Oversold
description: Mean Reversion backtest results. Universe: top-1500 domestic, FCF>2%, net debt <=1x, vol >=$20M. Stage-1: top-200 by FCF yield. Stage-2: 10 most oversold. Daily rebalance. IS 2001-2021: CAGR +28.1%, IR 0.711, MaxDD -76.9%. OOS 2022-2026: CAGR +13.0%, IR 0.374, MaxDD -37.6%. Point-in-time corrected: fundamentals now visible only strictly after the filing date (no same-day look-ahead — this mattered most here since MR rebalances daily and picks by FCF yield/oversold signal), and the revenue screen uses a cumulative as-of-date check instead of a whole-period future-peeking check.

title: MOM Strategy — Top-500 Domestic, FCF>0%
description: Momentum (6m1m) backtest results. Universe: top-500 domestic stocks by market cap, positive FCF. Weekly Friday rebalance (drift-hold between rebals), N=10. IS 2001-2021: CAGR +15.4%, IR 0.558, MaxDD -59.6%. OOS 2022-2026: CAGR +42.4%, IR 1.085, MaxDD -40.8%. Point-in-time corrected: fundamentals now visible only strictly after the filing date, and the revenue screen uses a cumulative as-of-date check.

title: LV Strategy — Top-600 Domestic, FCF>5%
description: Low Volatility backtest results. Universe: top-600 domestic stocks by market cap, FCF yield >5%. Weekly Friday rebalance (drift-hold between rebals), N=10, 60d vol signal. IS 2001-2021: CAGR +11.9%, IR 0.952, MaxDD -31.5%. OOS 2022-2026: CAGR +10.4%, IR 0.877, MaxDD -12.5%. Point-in-time corrected: fundamentals now visible only strictly after the filing date (no same-day look-ahead), and the revenue screen uses a cumulative as-of-date check (crossed the growing bar at some point in the past, using the threshold that applied then) rather than a whole-period future-peeking check.
